title: Question: wreal usage
body:
---


Author Name: **Art. FR**
Original Redmine Message: 1211 from https://www.veripool.org



---

Hello everyone,

do I need any special options to verilate verilog-ams files with wreal?

here's the module I am trying to verilate:

module dac (/*autoarg*/
    // Outputs   
    aout,   
    // Inputs   
    in   
    );  

    input [15:0] in;
    output 	aout; 
    wreal aout;

    parameter real lsb = 1;
    assign  aout = $itor(in) * lsb;
    
endmodule

And here are the error messages:  
%Error: dac.vams:10: Unsupported in C: Cell has the same name as variable: aout  
%Error: dac.vams:9: ... Location of original declaration   
%Error: top.vams:3: Input/output/inout declaration not found for port: aout  
%Error: dac.vams:3: Input/output/inout declaration not found for port: aout  
%Error: dac.vams:9: Input/output/inout does not appear in port list: aout  
%Warning-IMPLICIT: dac.vams:13: Signal definition not found, creating implicitly: aout  
%Error: dac.vams:13: Unsupported in C: Variable has the same name as cell: aout  
%Error: dac.vams:10: ... Location of original declaration  

Any help is highly appreciated.

Regards,

Art.
